pageContext.name: Jade
pageContext.description: Fear and respect are not equals.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Jade Mortal Kombat 1:3 Scale Klassic Statue, a fierce new video game collectible inspired by the iconic fighting game heroine.  The Jade 1:3 Scale Klassic Statue measures 30 tall and 12 wide on a pedestal base inspired by the Dead Pool stage seen throughout the Mortal Kombat series. Skeletal remains float in the bubbling acid beneath Jade's boots while she stands with her weapons at the ready. She holds the Imperial Jubilee bo staff in her right hand, and her left clutches the razor-rang known as Shao Kahn's Bane.  The Jade Statue is inspired by her Klassic appearance in the Mortal Kombat games, fully sculpted with detailed costume textures and an athletic physique. This stealth assassin and imperial bodyguard wears a green and black bodysuit with matching gloves and thigh-high boots. Accents like mesh, lacing, and rivets add to the vibrant design of her signature style. Jade's masked portrait features black hair drawn into a bun, a pair of black earrings, and an intense expression as she seeks to protect Kitana and end the cruel reign of Shao Kahn. The statue also includes an additional unmasked portrait featuring an alternate hairstyle, with long black hair flowing down and around her back. With her focused expression revealed in full, collectors have an added display option in their collection.  Forget the Fatality — put the finishing touch on your video game collection with the Jade Mortal Kombat 1:3 Scale Klassic Statue from Premium Collectibles Studio today!
